meta.title: Helena Beauty | Massage & Aesthetics Aberdeen
meta.description: Helena Beauty — therapeutic massage, lymphatic care, body contouring, and advanced skin treatments in Aberdeen.

home.headline: Calm, capable hands for recovery, contour, and radiant skin.
home.lead: From lymphatic support and sports massage to wood therapy, advanced body contouring, and results-driven facials — every treatment is explained clearly so you know what to expect.
home.popularBody: A snapshot of what clients book most often — each has its own page with benefits and who it suits best.
home.pillar1Body: Honest timelines, aftercare you can follow, and no overstated promises — especially around surgery and laser.
home.pillar2Body: Training load, desk posture, hydration, and stress all shape outcomes; we factor them into your plan.
home.pillar3Body: A quiet, professional environment where medical history and body goals are handled respectfully.

servicesPage.title: Treatments tailored to your body and skin goals
servicesPage.intro: Eleven dedicated pages — browse by category, then open any treatment for benefits, ideal candidates, and important session notes.

serviceDetail.ctaBody: Share your goals and any medical history so we can confirm suitability.

contactPage.title: Let’s plan your next visit
contactPage.intro: The fastest way to reach Helena Beauty is through Instagram direct messages — mention the treatment you’re interested in and any relevant medical or surgical history.
contactPage.placeholderBody: Replace this block with phone, email, booking link, or address when you’re ready — the layout is set up for one primary CTA (Instagram) plus optional secondary channels.

imageAlts.body-contouring: Hands-on contouring session smoothing and shaping along the waist and hips
